items.name_en: M83616 Blue Denim! This Pochette Cosmétique makeup bag is cut into a trendy, relaxed silhouette. Fashionable faded denim tones are applied to certified cotton canvas, paired with calfskin trim and dazzling rivets. Ample space to hold cosmetics and small personal items, making it a perfect travel companion.
items.name_cn:

Fashionable faded denim tones are applied to certified cotton canvas, paired with calfskin trim and dazzling rivets. Ample space to hold cosmetics and small personal items, making it a perfect travel companion.
Size: 19 x 12 x 6 cm (Length x Height x Width).

items.name_cn:
M83637
M82210
This Wallet on Chain Ivy bag features a rounded rectangular silhouette crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed soft-grain calfskin, accommodating a wallet, phone, keys, and lipstick. The adjustable leather strap and chain are detachable for versatile styling and carrying options.
23.5 x 12 x 4.3 cm
(Length x Height x Width)

items.name_cn:
M83641 Silver Buckle
Soft Monogram Unplant leather in blue, highlighting the feminine design 'Portomone Rosari'. The rounded flap features a silver 'Louis Vuitton' signature buckle, making it a compact wallet. It has a flat pocket, a zippered coin pocket, and 2 card slots.
11 x 8 x 2.5 cm

specs.rawTitle:
M83641 Silver Buckle
Soft Monogram Unplant leather in blue, highlighting the feminine design 'Portomone Rosari'. The rounded flap features a silver 'Louis Vuitton' signature buckle, making it a compact wallet. It has a flat pocket, a zippered coin pocket, and 2 card slots.
11 x 8 x 2.5 cm

items.name_cn:
M83645
Crafted from soft Monogram Unplant leather and accented with silver hardware, the "Porto Cult Romy" features three card slots, a "V"-shaped flat pocket, and a coin pocket with a zipper. It is a stylish and practical accessory. The LV circle pull adds a refined touch.
Dimensions 12 8 0.8.

specs.rawTitle:
M83645
Crafted from soft Monogram Unplant leather and accented with silver hardware, the "Porto Cult Romy" features three card slots, a "V"-shaped flat pocket, and a coin pocket with a zipper. It is a stylish and practical accessory. The LV circle pull adds a refined touch.
Dimensions 12 8 0.8.

items.name_cn:
M83649
Made of Monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "Portefeuil Lisa" is a compact wallet featuring a coin pocket with a strap and an LV circle pull. Its size is also charming for small bags and clutches. Inside, it has a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 11.5 1.5

specs.rawTitle:
M83649
Made of Monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "Portefeuil Lisa" is a compact wallet featuring a coin pocket with a strap and an LV circle pull. Its size is also charming for small bags and clutches. Inside, it has a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 11.5 1.5

items.name_en: M83689 Rabbit🐰! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced items with vibrant brushstrokes. The Zippy Large Wallet has a capacity comparable to a small bag. It features a smartphone pocket and can hold keys, a passport, credit cards, and cash. Easily stores personal essentials, the perfect travel companion. Dimensions 19Cmx10cm.

items.name_en: M83690 Little Duck! ZIPPY Zip Coin Purse The ideal choice for the urbanite. Exquisitely compact, it fits coins, credit cards, and folded bills. Easily slips into small pockets. 11*8*2cm.

items.name_en: M83691 Puppy! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced toys. The Monogram canvas is accented with a puppy image and Epi calfskin appliqué, adding a colorful and playful touch to everyday looks.
items.name_cn:
M83691 Puppy! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced toys. The Monogram canvas is accented with a puppy image and Epi calfskin appliqué, adding a colorful and playful touch to everyday looks.
11 x 7 x 0.5 cm.

items.name_cn:
Madrid [Small] Handbag
- Poetry in Architecture
A tribute to the eternal beauty of Madrid ❤️
Small size: 23.5-10-19cm
Named after Madrid, the brand's birthplace, the Madrid handbag draws inspiration from the city's architectural aesthetics and cultural temperament.
- Crafted with brand-exclusive calfskin
Featuring a delicate touch, the lining is made of soft Nappa leather. The iconic gold Pebble magnetic snap and enlarged zipper design add both practicality and interesting details, while the bottom Pebble metal studs protect the base and enhance stability.
Designer Jonathan Anderson drew inspiration from the fluid lines of the Madrid Temple arches,
incorporating a trapezoidal silhouette and loose pleats into the bag body, echoing the geometric beauty of the cityscape while imparting a casual, relaxed modern feel.

items.name_en: Make sure to recognize the thick fabric ⚠️
items.name_cn:
Make sure to recognize the thick fabric ⚠️
Small [Book Tote]
Most people think of buying practical classic styles when consuming luxury brands 💄But a collaboration art TOTE like DIO R should be a key collection piece, full of vintage vibes 😋Carry it and you are a fashion icon ⚪It really holds a lot 😍Super spacious, feels like it can hold the whole world!
Size: 26.5cm
